text.content:
2
*�����������������# me - this DAT
# par - the Par object that has changed
# val - the current value
# prev - the previous value
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Parameter Execute DAT.

def valueChange(par, val, prev):
	if par.eval():
		parent().par.Targetsop.enable = False
		parent().par.Resolutionw.enable = False
		parent().par.Translatex.enable = False
		parent().par.Rotatex.enable = False
		parent().par.Fov.enable = False
	else:
		parent().par.Targetsop.enable = True
		parent().par.Resolutionw.enable = True
		parent().par.Translatex.enable = True
		parent().par.Rotatex.enable = True
		parent().par.Fov.enable = True
	return

def onPulse(par):
	if par.name == 'Resetsweetspot':
		op('sweetSpotCam').par.Reset.pulse()
	elif par.name == 'Helppage':
		ui.viewFile('http://www.derivative.ca/wiki088/index.php?title=Palette:sweetSpot')
	return

def expressionChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def exportChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def enableChange(par, val, prev):
	return

def modeChange(par, val, prev):
	return

text.content:
2
*�����������������!# me is this DAT.
# 
# panelValue is the PanelValue object that changed.
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Panel Execute DAT.

def offToOn(panelValue):
	valueName = panelValue.name
	panelOwner = panelValue.owner.panel
	ctrl = panelOwner.ctrl
	shift = panelOwner.shift
	print(ctrl,shift)
	u = panelOwner.u
	v = panelOwner.v
	if ctrl > 0:
		u = 0.5
	if shift > 0:
		v = 0.5
	if valueName not in ['u','v']:
		ext.ArcBall.StartTransform(btn=valueName, u=u, v=v)
	return

def whileOn(panelValue):
	valueName = panelValue.name
	panelOwner = panelValue.owner.panel
	ctrl = panelOwner.ctrl
	shift = panelOwner.shift
	transAmt = parent().par.Transmult
	dollyAmt = parent().par.Dolmult
	rotAmt = parent().par.Rotmult
	u = panelOwner.u
	v = panelOwner.v
	if ctrl > 0:
		u = 0.5
	if shift > 0:
		v = 0.5
	if valueName not in ['u','v']:
		if valueName == 'lselect':
			scaleAmt = rotAmt
		elif valueName == 'rselect':
			scaleAmt = transAmt
		else:
			scaleAmt = dollyAmt
		ext.ArcBall.Transform(btn=valueName, u=u, v=v, scaler=scaleAmt)

	return

2
*�����������������N# me - this DAT
# panelValue - the PanelValue object that changed
# 
# Make sure the corresponding toggle is enabled in the Panel Execute DAT.

def offToOn(panelValue):
	return
	
def onToOff(panelValue):
	return
	
def whileOff(panelValue):
	panelOwner = panelValue.owner.panel
	uStart = op('null1')['u']
	vStart = op('null1')['v']
	uEnd = op('null1')['u1']
	vEnd = op('null1')['v1']
	slope = op('null1')['slope']
	if slope != 0.0:
		ext.ArcBall.StartTransform(btn='lselect',u=uStart,v=vStart)
		ext.ArcBall.Transform(btn='lselect',u=uEnd,v=vEnd,scaler=slope*parent().par.Rotmult/20)
	return
